events.name: Parallel speech bubble: Male student 1 during lunch break
◎Character: Mao (in front of the right staircase)

parameters: Hey, otaku, don't talk to me. ”
"Who do you give permission to talk to me?"
"Tsk, you must be in a good position to go to school with a woman."
"Don't let creepy nerds come over here."
"W-why is a creepy nerd like you with Yumesaki..."
“What the hell? Go away, you disgusting.
Also, don't get carried away just because you're good friends with Yumesaki, okay? ”
“Hey, are bocchi meals these days something you do outside?”
Is it because creepy otakus are always lazy that they have free time? ”
``Maybe I'll grab a random woman and play with her...''
"Haruka Kagami is one of the women I'm after.
Hey, don't be too conceited just because you're good friends. ”
"Yumesaki is waiting for someone at the entrance!?
Oh, is it me? It's definitely not you, just die. ”
Remember this! I'm definitely going with Kagami or Yumesaki... Damn it, damn it! ”
``There's another love letter...I never get tired of it every day.''
I wonder who is putting it out? ”
``A love letter is like a lottery ticket.
“Today is also a great love letter, yes.
“Oh, I wonder if you brought a love letter too?
Don't be silly, you disgusting pig. ”
I wonder if the lottery was random? ”
Even I...well, I'll die in two seconds. ”
“I was called during lunch break, where was it?”
“Hmm, maybe I should eat with my confession partner during lunch break?
That's why I refuse everything. I don't belong to anyone. ”
"I'm going to get confessed to today too. Of course I'll shake it, okay?
Eh, you? That's beside the point. Please disappear. ”
"Haruka Kagami? Is there anyone who doesn't know her?
She's the most popular girl after me, right? ”
“Oh, I guess Kazuo Yumesaki will also be participating in the lottery?
You'll know the extent of what kind of ugly man is coming. ”
"You guys are going to be together again.
Yumesaki Kazusou is also a failure. Is it only for ugly people? ”

parameters: (The day has begun. I'll do my best today as well and become friends with Yumesaki-san.
